zFmore than one element. There cannot be both '%s' and '%s' in one rule.rf

zOmore than one 'action' element. There cannot be both '%s' and '%s' in one rule.z
unknown element %srT
z0'family' outside of rule. Use 'rule family=...'.rb
z4'priority' outside of rule. Use 'rule priority=...'.z:'%s' outside of any element. Use 'rule <element> %s= ...'.z,'%s' outside of rule. Use 'rule ... %s ...'.rK
zH'family' attribute cannot have '%s' value. Use 'ipv4' or 'ipv6' instead.z(invalid 'priority' attribute value '%s'.r8
